message:
fix(fcp-store): replace truncating u64-to-u32 casts with saturating try_from

Remove #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)] and replace as u32
casts with u32::try_from(...).unwrap_or(u32::MAX) to saturate on
overflow instead of silently truncating coverage calculations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
